name: A-team Sports
description: Come play pickleball at A-team Sports in Lawrence, KS! There is 1 indoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free. Players have access to food, lights, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. The court can be reserved.

name: East Lawrence Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at East Lawrence Recreation Center in Lawrence, KS! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Lyons Park in North Lawrence
description: Come play pickleball at Lyons Park in North Lawrence in Lawrence, KS! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Sports Pavilion At Rock Chalk Park
description: Sports Pavilion At Rock Chalk Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lawrence, KS. There are 16 wood, concrete, and hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Free to Douglas County residents.

name: Sports Pavilion Lawrence
description: Sports Pavilion Lawrence is a place to play pickleball in Lawrence, KS. There are 16 wood and concrete courts. 8 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and food. Reservations are available.

name: Veterans Park
description: Veterans Park is a place to play pickleball in Lawrence, KS. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights.
